title: JIMJOOS Waterproof Kids Swimming Cap - 100% Silicone Durable and Odour Free Swim Hat - Stretchable, Anti slip Swim Cap - Swimming Hat for up to 8 Years With Protective Pouch
features: Premium Quality: Jimjoos swim cap kids is made from premium quality 100% soft silicone material which is durable, stretchable and waterproof. The silicone material is also odourless, non-toxic, skin-friendly so our premium swim hat girls is safe to use.

Great Protection: These waterproof swimming caps protect childs hair and ear from chlorine and other harmful bacteria found in swimming pool water. These perfect fit kids swim caps keep your kid hair and ear dry and save hours of blow drying.

Comfortable Design: Girls swim cap is designed in the shape of a human skull which makes a snug fit for most kids and easy to take on and off without snagging their hair. The kids swim cap also helps in swim faster with less water resistance.

Strong And Stretchable: The childrens swimming cap is stong and stretchy for girls and boys with short or long hair. Eco-friendly, non-allergenic and lightweight toddler swim hat prevents floating hair and increases kids vision in the pool.

Protective Pouch: Our swimming hats come with protective pouch which protects silicone swimming cap from dirt, dust and preserves its shape. It also helps to store wet swimming cap in children changing bag which prevents dry clothes getting wet.

Anti Slip Texture: Our kids swim hat has anti slip texture inside which is ideal swimmers who are looking for swimming cap for long hair. Kids who wants swimming cap for braids will also enjoy swimming with this black swim cap also a swim caps that keep hair dry

Swim Faster: This pink swimming cap swimming cap will help you swim faster when worn correctly, swimming cap long hair helps reduce drag in the water, therefore, increasing hydrodynamics. In layman's terms, it helps a swimmer go faster!

Safety During In Open Water: Looking to try your hand at open water? Making yourself visible and noticeable is highly important in terms of your safety. A brightly colored open water swimming hat makes you stick out against the backgrounds of blues, browns, and greens.

Protects Your Ear: Swim caps also help with keeping water out of your ears if they’re covering your ears. While it won’t keep them 100% dry, it does help keep them from being submerged all the time. Swim caps also help keep earplugs in place when you’re swimming.

Multiple Colours: Afro swimming cap kids comes with various attractive and vibrant solid colours, our swim hat kids can meet most people's needs, you can choose the colour to match your kids swimsuit. It is unisex for both girls and boys with long hair.
description: MAIN FEATURES GOOD ELASTICITY & NO DEFORMATION Thicker than latex, this silicone swim cap is flexible to fit any sized head, Featuring great elasticity, this swim cap can be stretched easily for optimum fit for hair styles of all length, such as long hair, shoulder length, and thick hair. STURDY & THICKER WATERPROOF SILICONE MATERIAL Tear resistant, odourless, this amazing swimmer’s cap uses premium-quality waterproof silicone material for longevity ANTI SLIP PREVENTS SWIM CAP FALLING OFF Avoid the embarrassment of swim cap falling off when swimming, even with short hair the anti slip texture will not let the swimming cap come off easily. Built to fit and protect long hair, thick hair, braided hair etc. Asymmetrically designed to create more space. PROTECTIVE POUCH Our swimming cap comes with protective pouch which keeps swim hats clean and bacteria free. It also helps to keep them in the original shape, provides better storage and keeps your clothes dry while in changing bag. Care Tips - Avoid sharp nails, rings, or other sharp objects. - Rinse in cold fresh water after every use. - Do not leave exposed in direct sunlight. - Wipe dry immediately on both the inner side and the outer side. - Lightly sprinkle with talcum powder between each use to keep swim cap in optimal condition. - If you have long hair, please roll them into a bun upwards and tie it with a rubber band before you put on the swimming cap.
